case_title: STELLA TAN VS. GRAND VIEW FINANCIAL LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-02-2020 CONTINUED TO OCT-14-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-01-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

QUIET TITLE - REAL PROPERTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAN, STELLA AS TO DEFENDANT GRAND VIEW FINANCIAL LLC A WYOMING LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY ROGERS, STEVEN JOSEPH , AN INDIVIDUAL SEDLAR, ROBERT WAYNE , AN INDIVIDUAL GAN, AUDREY GRACE , AN INDIVIDUAL ALL PERSONS UNKNOWN, CLAIMING ANY LEGAL OR EQUITABLE RIGHT, TITLE, ESTATE, LIEN, OR INTEREST IN THE PROPERTY DESCRIBED IN THE COMPLAINT ADVERSE TO PLAINTIFF'S TITLE, OR ANY CLOUD ON PLAINTIFF'S TITLE THERETO DOES 1 TO 50, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-02-2020 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-02-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-10-2020
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT NAMING DOE 1 (TRANSACTION ID # 100102963) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAN, STELLA

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-01-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-14-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100114122)
